content.text:
<user_query>
Workspace: current repo root. Task: inventory ONLY active edge functions under supabase/functions (ignore .tmp and backups). Return: (1) list of function names, (2) one-line purpose from code, (3) whether directly used in calibration/CMO report flow, with evidence file paths in backend/routes and frontend hooks/components. Thoroughness: medium.
</user_query>
Exploring `supabase/functions` and tracing references to calibration/CMO flows.

Here is an inventory of what lives under `c:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\Version2-Ai_Mentor\tpn\supabase\functions` (excluding `.tmp`, backups, and non-function files such as `boardroom-diagnosis\SETUP.md`). There are **32** deployable function folders, each with an `index.ts`.

---

### Summary: calibration / Chief Marketing Summary (CMO) flow

**Treated as ‚Äúin flow‚Äù** when code feeds the calibration advisor journey or the **Chief Marketing Summary** (`ChiefMarketingSummary.js` is fed by `wowSummary` / enrichment / intelligence from `useCalibrationState.js`; it does **not** call edge functions itself).

| In CMO / calibration flow? | Evidence |
|---------------------------|----------|
| **Yes** | `backend\routes\calibration.py` ‚Äî parallel edge calls for website enrichment (`deep-web-recon`, `social-enrichment`, `competitor-monitor`, `market-analysis-ai`, `market-signal-scorer`, `browse-ai-reviews`, `semrush-domain-intel`). |
| **Yes** | `frontend\src\hooks\useCalibrationState.js` ‚Äî `callEdgeWithTrace` / website scan: `calibration-psych`, `calibration-sync`, `biqc-insights-cognitive`, `scrape-business-profile`, `calibration-business-dna`, `business-identity-lookup`; `POST /calibration/enrichment/website` triggers backend enrichment above. |
| **Yes (comment only)** | `frontend\src\components\calibration\AgentCalibrationChat.js` ‚Äî documents `calibration-psych`. |
| **No (in repo tree)** | Functions only referenced from other backends (`boardroom.py`, workers, `integrations.py` allowlist without calibration hook usage, etc.) ‚Äî listed per function below. |

---

### Full list (name, one-line purpose, calibration/CMO?)

1. **biqc-insights-cognitive** ‚Äî Executive cognition: loads user/Merge context and produces cognitive insights. **Yes** ‚Äî `useCalibrationState.js` (`callEdgeWithTrace` / `intelligence_snapshot`); `backend\routes\health.py` (health list).

2. **biqc-trinity** ‚Äî Parallel OpenAI + Anthropic + Gemini then synthesizes one answer. **No** ‚Äî no matches in `backend\routes` or `frontend\src` hooks/components (only `backend\ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md`).

3. **boardroom-diagnosis** ‚Äî Focus-area boardroom diagnosis narrative from integrations data. **No** ‚Äî `backend\routes\boardroom.py` only (not calibration route).

4. **browse-ai-reviews** ‚Äî Customer and employer reviews via Browse AI scraping API. **Yes** ‚Äî `backend\routes\calibration.py` (enrichment orchestration).

5. **business-brain-merge-ingest** ‚Äî Pulls Merge.dev CRM/accounting datasets into `business_core`. **No** ‚Äî `backend\biqc_jobs.py`, `backend\intelligence_automation_worker.py` (not calibration/CMO hooks).

6. **business-brain-metrics-cron** ‚Äî Computes per-tenant revenue/pipeline/sales metrics from `business_core` tables. **No** ‚Äî no references in `backend\routes` or `frontend\src` (function referenced from `calibration-engine` text only).

7. **business-identity-lookup** ‚Äî ABN/business identity via Australian Business Register. **Yes** ‚Äî `useCalibrationState.js` (`callEdgeWithTrace` / `abn_lookup`).

8. **calibration-business-dna** ‚Äî Firecrawl + GPT extraction of Business DNA and identity signals from a website. **Yes** ‚Äî `useCalibrationState.js`; tests mention `calibration-business-dna` (`backend\tests\test_iteration95_forensic_corrections.py`).

9. **calibration-engine** ‚Äî Readiness scores and gaps from profile, operator persona, integrations, `business_core` counts. **No** ‚Äî `backend\routes\integrations.py` (proxy allowlist); not used in `useCalibrationState.js` or `ChiefMarketingSummary.js`.

10. **calibration-psych** ‚Äî 6-step operator psychology / persona calibration (SoundBoard persona). **Yes** ‚Äî `useCalibrationState.js`, `AgentCalibrationChat.js`.

11. **calibration_psych** ‚Äî Legacy shim that forwards to `calibration-psych`. **Yes** (same as above) ‚Äî `supabase\functions\calibration_psych\index.ts`; `backend\routes\integrations.py` resolves to `calibration-psych`.

12. **calibration-sync** ‚Äî Post-calibration sync from psych conversation into `business_profiles` / `strategy_profiles`. **Yes** ‚Äî `useCalibrationState.js`.

13. **cfo-cash-analysis** ‚Äî CFO analysis on Merge accounting data; raises financial intelligence actions. **No** ‚Äî `backend\routes\health.py` only among routes; not calibration hooks.

14. **checkin-manager** ‚Äî Recalibration / check-in alert actions. **No** ‚Äî `backend\routes\integrations.py` allowlist; not referenced from calibration hook/components.

15. **competitor-monitor** ‚Äî Weekly/manual competitor re-scan and alerts. **Yes** ‚Äî `backend\routes\calibration.py` (enrichment).

16. **deep-web-recon** ‚Äî Site scraping + signals/SWOT-style recon for a website. **Yes** ‚Äî `backend\routes\calibration.py`; also `backend\email_sync_worker.py` (out of calibration UI).

17. **email_priority** ‚Äî AI email priority classification into inbox tables. **No** ‚Äî no matches in `backend\routes` or `frontend\src` under those paths.

18. **gmail_prod** ‚Äî Gmail tokens and Gmail API actions. **No** ‚Äî `frontend\src\pages\GmailTest.js` (not calibration).

19. **intelligence-bridge** ‚Äî Turns Watchtower/snapshot findings into `intelligence_actions`. **No** ‚Äî `backend\watchtower_engine.py`, `backend\snapshot_agent.py` (not calibration/CMO components).

20. **market-analysis-ai** ‚Äî On-demand market analysis (user data + Firecrawl) ‚Üí SWOT and recommendations. **Yes** ‚Äî `backend\routes\calibration.py` (enrichment). (Standalone page `MarketAnalysis.js` does not reference this edge function by name in grep.)

21. **market-signal-scorer** ‚Äî Aggregates profile, snapshot, benchmarks, events into market positioning/signal scores. **Yes** ‚Äî `backend\routes\calibration.py` (enrichment).

22. **merge-webhook-ingest** ‚Äî Verifies Merge webhooks and ingests events. **No** ‚Äî no app route/hook references (webhook endpoint).

23. **outlook_auth** ‚Äî Outlook OAuth flows. **No** ‚Äî no matches in `backend\routes` or calibration frontend.

24. **query-integrations-data** ‚Äî Soundboard queries to Merge + profile data. **No** ‚Äî `frontend\src\components\SoundboardPanel.js` (not calibration/CMO).

25. **refresh_tokens** ‚Äî Refreshes Gmail/Outlook OAuth tokens (cron). **No** ‚Äî no calibration references.

26. **scrape-business-profile** ‚Äî Deterministic HTML metadata scrape (no LLM). **Yes** ‚Äî `useCalibrationState.js`.

27. **semrush-domain-intel** ‚Äî SEMrush SEO/paid/competitive intel for a domain. **Yes** ‚Äî `backend\routes\calibration.py` (enrichment).

28. **social-enrichment** ‚Äî Social handle discovery/evidence from web content. **Yes** ‚Äî `backend\routes\calibration.py` (enrichment).

29. **sop-generator** ‚Äî Generates SOPs/checklists/action plans from business context. **No** ‚Äî `backend\routes\health.py` only in routes; not calibration hooks.

30. **strategic-console-ai** ‚Äî Executive briefing or Q&A over connected data. **No** ‚Äî `backend\routes\boardroom.py` (not calibration CMO).

31. **warm-cognitive-engine** ‚Äî No-op warm-up (204) to load Deno secrets. **No** ‚Äî `backend\routes\integrations.py` allowlist only; no `frontend\src` usage found.

32. **watchtower-brain** ‚Äî Guided extraction of the ‚Äú17-Point Strategic Map‚Äù via AI. **No** ‚Äî `backend\routes\platform_services.py` (not calibration hooks/components).

---

### Notes

- **`backend\routes\integrations.py`** ‚Äî `EDGE_PROXY_ALLOWLIST` includes many of the above; the calibration UI uses the proxy via `callEdgeFunction` from the frontend API layer for allowlisted names (see `frontend\src\lib\api.js` path `/edge/functions/{name}`).
- **`backend\core\cognitive_context.py`** references `functions/v1/intelligence-snapshot`, which is **not** a folder under `supabase/functions` in this repo (possible stale name or separate deploy).
- **Chief Marketing UI**: `frontend\src\components\calibration\ChiefMarketingSummary.js` has **no** direct `functions/v1` usage; it depends on state built by `useCalibrationState.js` and `backend\routes\calibration.py` enrichment.
